overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a futuristic subway train in Cyberpunk 2077. The player sits in an NCART train car traveling through Night City, observing other passengers in a dimly lit interior with green neon lighting. The train travels through tunnels and briefly stops at Japantown South station.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic subway train interior traveling through tunnel

agents.ego_description: sitting in subway seat observing the train interior and other passengers while traveling

notable_agents.action: passenger with short dark hair repeatedly drinking from a bottle
group of passengers standing and holding support poles

entered.detail: dark metal bench seating along the left wall of the train car
long linear fluorescent lights running the length of the ceiling
vertical metal poles for standing passengers to hold
green illuminated digital sign showing train information
large windows showing dark tunnel walls passing by

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit futuristic subway train with green neon lighting. The camera sits at eye level looking down the length of the car, with metal benches on the left and passengers standing in the center. A passenger in the foreground right repeatedly drinks from a bottle while the train moves through a dark tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train arriving at Japantown South station platform

events.description: train arrives at Japantown South station, red neon platform lights become visible through windows
automated announcement plays requesting passengers make room for fellow travelers

agents.ego_description: sitting in subway seat as the train arrives and stops at the station platform

notable_agents.action: foreground passenger continues drinking from bottle while train stops

entered.detail: bright red neon lights from the Japantown South station platform visible through train windows

segments.scene_description: The train slows and arrives at Japantown South station, with intense red platform lights flooding through the left windows. The digital display shows the station name, and an automated announcement plays. The interior lighting mixes with the red exterior glow while passengers remain in place.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train departing station and entering tunnel

events.description: train departs Japantown South station, red platform lights disappear as train enters dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: sitting in subway seat as the train accelerates away from the station into the tunnel

notable_agents.action: foreground passenger takes another drink from bottle as train moves

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and the red platform lights fade from view, returning the scene to the green-lit interior with dark tunnel walls visible through the windows. The foreground passenger continues their repetitive drinking motion as the train accelerates forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective inside a futuristic subway car that transitions from the dim green glow of a tunnel into the vivid red light of a station before returning to darkness. It begins at eye level looking down the length of the car, where passengers stand among metal benches and a figure in the foreground repeatedly drinks from a bottle. As the train slows, the scene is suddenly flooded with intense red platform lights from the Japantown South station, blending with the interior neon as a digital display identifies the stop. The environment then shifts back as the train departs, causing the red glow to fade and the dark tunnel walls to reappear through the windows. Finally, the camera settles back into the green-lit atmosphere as the train accelerates forward, with the foreground passenger continuing their repetitive motion.
